short.en: SolidWorks and Fusion 360 design for parts, assemblies, and prototypes — built to print, machine, or mold.
short.sl: Oblikovanje s SolidWorksom in Fusion 360 za dele, sklope in prototipe — pripravljeno za tisk, obdelavo ali kalupljenje.

long.en: Four years of SolidWorks and Fusion 360 in production. I model parts the way you will actually make them — clean trees, parametric, with simulation runs where the load matters. From a sketch on a napkin to a print-ready STEP and a clean technical drawing.
long.sl: Štiri leta SolidWorksa in Fusion 360 v praksi. Modele zgradim tako, kot jih boš dejansko izdelal — čisto drevo, parametrično, s simulacijami tam, kjer obremenitev šteje. Od skice na servjeti do STEP datoteke za tisk in čiste tehnične risbe.

en: A description of what the part has to do
Reference photos, sketches, or a rough STL
Target manufacturing process if you know it
sl: Referenčne slike, skice ali groba STL
Predviden proizvodni proces, če ga poznaš
